label: Subagent • unified recursion guard refuses nesting
query: A scripted subagent that tries to start another subagent mid-run.
notes: Model-free. While the outer scripted kind runs, it calls SubagentSession.run for a nested kind; the unified guard (activeKindId) must refuse it with a `rejected` envelope. Pins the single recursion guard that replaced the per-tool delegation guards.
